indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Rows of seats facing a stage suggest a theater or auditorium, not a workspace.

indicators.name: stage with curtains
indicators.rationale: The stage with curtains indicates a performance or presentation space, not a workspace.

indicators.name: lack of flat work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface suitable for placing a laptop or other work tools.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The seating arrangement and stage with curtains suggest a theater or auditorium, not a workspace. There is no flat work surface suitable for placing a laptop or other work tools, making it difficult to set up a productive workstation.
